narrative_text: A clockwork cat named Geary is balancing on a high, copper wire above the bustling Steam-City. Tell me how Geary looks as he prepares to jump down to the glowing street below!
branch_summary: A mechanical cat explores a glowing steampunk city from the high wires.
scene_description: A vibrant steampunk cityscape at twilight, filled with brass pipes, glowing amber streetlamps, and swirling purple smog. The composition is a high-angle shot looking down from a rooftop, with copper wires criss-crossing the foreground. The lighting is warm and golden from the lamps, contrasting with the deep indigo of the coming night.

properties.color: burnished bronze with polished silver joints
properties.size: small, about the size of a toaster
properties.texture: metallic and smooth with visible tiny rivets
properties.pattern: etched filigree swirls on the flanks
properties.distinctive_features: glowing teal glass eyes and a tail made of segmented brass rings

entities.pose: crouched low on all fours, tail slightly arched for balance, looking downward

properties.size: long and thin, stretching across the frame
properties.distinctive_features: small sparks of blue static electricity jumping off the surface

entities.pose: taut and horizontal across the upper third of the scene

properties.color: dark wrought iron with a warm amber bulb
properties.size: medium, reaching up from the bottom of the frame
properties.distinctive_features: a thick glass globe filled with flickering fireflies
releasing puffs of thick, lavender-colored steam

entities.pose: vertical, partially obscured by the edge of the frame

error_exclusions.reason: There is only one mechanical cat.
The wire is a static environment object.
